title: Raghav Chadha, Harbhajan Singh among 7 AAP Rajya Sabha MPs to join BJP - Who are they?
description: Chadha addressed a press confernece and said that seven out of 10 Rajya Sabha MPs of AAP are set to merge with the BJP. As per the Constitution, two-thirds of the total MPs of a party can merge with another party, Chadha said.
